testcase.name: verifyDefaultExpiryDateIsValid

failure.message: BUG: Default expiry year is 2016, should be current/future year

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: BUG: Default expiry year is 2016, should be current/future year at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at tests.HomePageTest.verifyDefaultExpiryDateIsValid(HomePageTest.java:636) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:141) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:697) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethod(TestInvoker.java:230) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:203) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:154) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:134) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at org.testng.TestRunner.privateRun(TestRunner.java:744) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.privateRun(SuiteRunner.java:373) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.run(SuiteRunner.java:312) at org.testng.SuiteRunnerWorker.runSuite(SuiteRunnerWorker.java:52) at org.testng.SuiteRunnerWorker.run(SuiteRunnerWorker.java:95) at org.testng.TestNG.runSuitesSequentially(TestNG.java:1274) at org.testng.TestNG.runSuitesLocally(TestNG.java:1208) at org.testng.remote.RemoteTestNG.initAndRun(RemoteTestNG.java:293) at org.testng.remote.RemoteTestNG.main(RemoteTestNG.java:91)

testcase.name: verifyExpiredDefaultDateRejected

failure.message: BUG: Order accepted with expired default date expected [false] but found [true]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: BUG: Order accepted with expired default date expected [false] but found [true] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertFalse(Assert.java:79) at tests.HomePageTest.verifyExpiredDefaultDateRejected(HomePageTest.java:662) at testcase.name: verifyProductDetailPage

failure.message: expected [Men's Tech Shell Full-Zip] but found [Men's Tech Shell Full-Zip - SHOP]
